name: Rockerbox Marketing Attribution API
what_it_does: Rockerbox marketing attribution platform REST API for DTC brands and e-commerce companies to measure cross-channel advertising performance with deterministic customer-level attribution, offline conversion tracking, and media mix modeling that reconciles paid, organic, and offline channel performance in a single view. Enables AI agents to manage attribution data retrieval for cross-channel marketing measurement automation, handle customer-level conversion path data for deterministic attribution automation, access offline conversion import for in-store and call center attribution automation, retrieve media mix model results for budget allocation automation, manage channel performance reporting for blended ROAS automation, handle custom attribution model configuration for business-specific measurement automation, access cohort analysis for customer acquisition cost automation, retrieve incremental lift measurement for causal attribution automation, manage data export to analytics platforms for BI integration automation, and integrate Rockerbox with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Shopify, and marketing platforms for end-to-end attribution automation.
use_cases: Measuring deterministic cross-channel attribution from DTC marketing agents
Importing offline conversions from omnichannel attribution agents
Retrieving blended ROAS from multi-channel performance reporting agents
Analyzing media mix model results from budget optimization agents
not_for: Small DTC brands with low ad spend (Rockerbox is mid-market to enterprise)
B2B SaaS attribution (Rockerbox is DTC/ecommerce and consumer brand focused)
Real-time bidding optimization (Rockerbox is analytics/reporting, not bid management)
best_when: A DTC or omnichannel brand wanting AI agents to automate deterministic cross-channel attribution measurement, offline conversion tracking, and media mix modeling through Rockerbox's privacy-resilient attribution platform.
avoid_when: PIXEL AND SDK IMPLEMENTATION DEPENDENCY: Rockerbox attribution requires pixel implementation on storefront and post-purchase page; automated attribution data quality depends on correct pixel installation; automated Rockerbox integration without proper pixel setup creates browser-only attribution with iOS/cookie limitations. API ACCESS REQUIRES PAID PLAN: Rockerbox API access requires professional or enterprise plan; automated API integration for starter customers creates unauthorized access; automated data pipeline must verify plan includes API feature. OFFLINE CONVERSION IMPORT SCHEMA REQUIREMENT: Rockerbox offline conversion import requires specific schema (email, revenue, channel, date); automated offline import must normalize CRM/POS data to Rockerbox schema; automated raw offline data import without schema validation creates import error. ATTRIBUTION WINDOW CONFIGURATION AFFECTS RESULTS: Rockerbox attribution windows are configurable (1-7-28 day click, 1-day view); automated reporting must use consistent attribution window; automated comparison across different window configurations creates misleading channel performance metrics.

auth.notes: Rockerbox uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2014 by Ron Jacobson and Rick O'Toole. Backed by Forerunner Ventures, Lerer Hippeau, FirstMark ($30M+ raised). Products: Deterministic attribution, media mix modeling, offline conversion, incrementality testing, data exports. No webhooks. GDPR. SOC2. Competes with Northbeam and Triple Whale for DTC attribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom pricing based on ad spend; typically $1,500-$5,000+/month
pricing.notes: New York NY. Forerunner backed. Custom pricing by ad spend volume. Annual contract typical.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; attribution and reporting APIs throttled; no real-time webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: DATA LATENCY FOR ATTRIBUTION REFRESH: Rockerbox attribution data refreshes on scheduled cycle (typically 12-24 hours); automated real-time decision-making on Rockerbox data creates decisions based on stale attribution; automated campaign optimization should use data freshness timestamp before pulling attribution

CHANNEL NAMING NORMALIZATION: Rockerbox normalizes channel names from ad platforms into Rockerbox taxonomy; automated channel performance reporting must use Rockerbox channel names, not platform-native names; automated Meta Ads campaign naming translated to Rockerbox 'paid_social' creates unexpected channel grouping

OFFLINE IMPORT DEDUPLICATION BY EMAIL: Rockerbox offline conversion import deduplicates by customer email; automated import of offline conversions without email creates unmatched conversion records without customer-level attribution; automated offline import must include hashed or raw email

INCREMENTALITY TEST CONFIGURATION REQUIRES SUPPORT: Rockerbox incrementality testing requires Rockerbox team configuration for hold-out groups; automated incrementality lift measurement cannot be self-served via API; automated lift test setup requires Rockerbox customer success engagement

API DOCUMENTATION REQUIRES LOGIN: Rockerbox API documentation is behind customer login; automated integration development requires active customer account; automated self-service integration without account creates undocumented API endpoint discovery challenge
agent_readiness.security_notes: DTC attribution. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Attribution and conversion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Marketing attribution. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Attribution and conversion data.
